page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr9i.4xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores running at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz, with a 1:1 mapping of threads to physical cores. The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core.

This instance operates on the KVM hypervisor and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached block storage. There are no integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with this instance type.

With its 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the instance is classified as memory-optimized. The dedicated physical core allocation without hyperthreading ensures predictable compute performance per vCPU. This resource profile is suitable for memory-intensive workloads, database hosting, and enterprise applications that require consistent CPU performance and a larger memory footprint without the need for local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr9i.4xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor featuring 16 dedicated physical cores at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz, with one thread per core. The instance provides 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding a resource density of 8.0 GB of memory per core. Network connectivity is established with a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps. This instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, requiring external network-attached storage for data persistence. The dedicated CPU allocation and high memory-to-vCPU ratio make this instance suitable for memory-intensive applications, database management systems, and enterprise workloads requiring predictable processing power.
